holdings.infoBox: IBRN is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are Axsome Therapeutics stock at 5.38%, Alkermes at 5.38%, Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals at 4.69%, Xenon Pharmaceuticals at 4.41%, and PTC Therapeutics at 4.32%.

overview.description: The iShares Neuroscience and Healthcare ETF (IBRN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that provides global equity exposure to companies that are positioned to benefit from neuroscience advancements. The index may hold securities from large- to small-cap. IBRN was launched on Aug 24, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: NYSE FactSet Global Neuro Biopharma and MedTech Index
